case_title: JOHN FRALISH VS. THE GAP, INC.
cause_of_action: PETITION RE: ARBITRATION (PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD)

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF MEGAN A. SUEHIRO IN SUPPORT OF RESPONDENT THE GAP, INC.[S RESPONSE TO PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND PAYMENT OF FEES AND COSTS (TRANSACTION ID # 210064048) FILED BY RESPONDENT THE GAP, INC.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-12-2024 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
NOTICE OF APPEAL (TRANSACTION ID # 73034625) FILED BY APPELLANT FRALISH, JOHN
ABANDONMENT OF APPEAL FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 73458372) BY APPELLANT FRALISH, JOHN
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 72064067), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PETITIONER FRALISH, JOHN SERVED FEB-14-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO RESPONDENT THE GAP, INC.

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MARCH-12-2024 HEARING RE: PETITIONER JOHN FRALISH'S NOTICE OF PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND PAYMENT OF FEES AND COSTS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE PARTIES AGREE THAT THIS MATTER SHOULD BE ARBITRATED PER THEIR AGREEMENT, SO IT IS ORDERED TO ARBITRATION BEFORE THE AMERICAN ARBITRATION ASSOCIATION - IF, INDEED, IT IS NOT ALREADY BEFORE THE AAA. ANY ISSUES REGARDING ARBITRATION FEES AND/OR COSTS CAN BE ADDRESSED IN THE ARBITRATION. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petition To Compel Arbitration And Payment Of Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Mar-12-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. ALEXANDER DARR, Esq. of Darr Law LLC (tel: 614-465-3277) for Petitioner.
Atty. MEGAN SUEHIRO, Esq. of Morgan, Lewis & Bockius LLP (213-612-2500) for Respondent.

Hearing Re: PETITIONER JOHN FRALISH's Notice Of Petition To Compel Arbitration And Payment Of Fees And Costs.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The parties agree that this matter should be arbitrated per their agreement, so it is ordered to arbitration before the American Arbitration Association - if, indeed, it is not already before the AAA. Any issues regarding arbitration fees and/or costs can be addressed in the arbitration.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported.(302/RBU)
